question.label: Partner clarity
question.name: With non-technical partners, where did your message last break down?
question.description: Turns her volunteered feedback into a concrete example of the communication gap.

answer: I tend to wait until analysis is complete before socializing direction.

assessment.note: She names a repeatable clarity gap: waiting until analysis is complete delays early alignment with non-technical partners. [THREAD-DEFERRED] 'wait until analysis is complete before socializing direction' is a concrete cause thread, but drill cap forces stage advance.
